reviews.review_description:
Dear Retreat VR Team,

I’ve been very much looking forward to exploring your app and the unique experiences it offers. Unfortunately, I’ve run into an issue accessing your support page—when I click “Contact Us,” the link doesn’t seem to lead to an active form or contact method.

I can’t get anything to play……help! I subscribed, and unsubscribed because I couldn’t get it to do anything

I only just joined and couldn't get in and forgot to cancel the subscription, so 52 dollars just went out and I still can't get in, from the first page.  Could you return my money or help me:), Tracie

Haven’t used for a while but had an active subscription which has been taken for months. Gone to get back on it and despite still paying I can’t access a single thing. Nowhere to log in etc. basically taking money and not able to get into it. Not a happy customer and can’t even have refunds on subscriptions where they don’t let you in! How’s that right?!

Unable to reseat the password. Why do we need to put our email and password to get into this app? Can't even reset the password.. no customer service, no phone number to call, no email to contact "Reseat app." It is very frustrating. It must be a better way to get into this app without all this headache. For now, I wouldn't even give a star for the time I spent struggling with this up. I'll come back and update my review if after this things got fixed.

The third day and I'm still not able to log in. The password reseat is not working. Very disappointing. Waiting for another day to see if it is getting fixed...
I also cannot change my password or not able to get into this app. That sucks.
As everyone else said nobody can log in and you don't get reset link

Disappointed.

Typically, of this day and age where things are made to look good on the surface, and yet the real substance actually costs you money.

Why can't people just be up front from the start.

Setup the account
Created password
Did the tutorial.
Then the hammer blow.

Subscribe monthly or annually. £££

So disappointing.

developer_response.body: Yes, this does have an annual subscription, this is stated on the Main Page after login. Its $9.99 a month or $99 a year and includes unlimited access to all programs. We are open to suggestions for improvement, and understand this may be a lot, but offer a lot more than your standard 10 hour play through video game. We designed the spaces to be social and interactive so you can discuss with and meet like minded individuals looking to "Learn in VR"

reviews.review_title: VR users just want to buy an app!
reviews.review_description:
I like the idea of having self-help courses via VR, but the "pay a LOT of money per course" model seems JUST AS BAD as a subscription model.

Here, asking VR users to buy COINS to purchase a course is even worse.

Why won't developers LEARN that VR users just want to buy an app!?!

TRIPP got it right -- I paid $20 up front for lifetime access to their content. Here, no way am I buying "tokens" to buy access to courses.

<I will leave this review up until you fix the model of accessing content. Defend the model saying "we have to pay our content providers," and I will start speaking LOUDLY against the app.  Reward your early adopters (one purchase, lifetime access) with a reasonable price and a promise to include lifetime access to future content, and I'll buy the app and change this to a ravingly positive review.>

12/6 UPDATE: The developer responded, and I want to investigate this further. I didn't think it was fair having very few reviews which caused my big ONE STAR review to have such an impact on the overall score. I want the developer to succeed, but not by selling tokens (like we're kids at some arcade, just buying high priced self help courses -- that is not the model I want to encourage, ever). Let's see if we can do something about that and help them make this a good value for their customers.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your honest feedback.  You bring up some great points.  We love that you care about the VR experience and you're the exact type of person we need giving feedback to the app for us so we can make it better.

We currently have 15+ hours of content in the app. This includes several meditation and relaxation videos in the Community Hub, a yoga course named Your Daily Reset, and Flow State, a meditation and Chi Gong course and courses on writing a book, public speaking and leadership. We kept the weekly price under a cup of coffee and will be adding content monthly with additional live events and panels with some of the worlds top subject matter experts.

reviews.review_title: Wow I felt great after playing this! :)
reviews.review_description:
From the moment you enter this app you know you are in for something special. Everything about this game makes you feel at peace and feeds your soul. I loved the surreal environments that really transport you into a higher mindset. 

The teachers I learned from gave great lessons and the creative use of effects really helps to translate some of the more abstract concepts.

Overall I love this app. If you are even remotely spiritual or at least open to it you will gain a lot from this.

developer_response.body: "...transform you to a higher mindset." What a great quote. We will be adding new courses monthly...stay tuned.

reviews.review_description: This app was a great idea.  The content is awesome and inspiring. The next best thing to attending a actual seminar.

developer_response.body: Thank you. Stay tuned for more live panels in VR, seminars and events!

reviews.review_description: There’s so many reasons to celebrate here. First, this is an awesome educational tool. The courses are short, sweet and really deliver on feeding the soul. I never even imagined an app that would not only produce fun lessons in VR, but ALSO really integrate the education into the VR design and experience. Second, the attention to detail with the design in the app makes me want to stay here. I’ve never felt more relaxed after leaving a VR environment. That alone is amazing. There’s something really special about this … This isn’t just a small step for man. This is a giant leap for mankind. There’s finally a reason for people/everyone to use VR.

developer_response.body: Thank you for these insights. We spent a lot of time consciously designing the spaces and architecture. We are adding new worlds and courses every month. Check back often.

reviews.review_description: I can access anything there are only a few items available and they are watch trailer only.  How do I contact support for this app?

What a neat space, I got this app to support a friend at an event. I came early to set up and then I ended up exploring the different areas and taking in the scenery. I love the ease of use , setting up an account is a breeze. I’m a PC/Quest gamer and I have several hundred hours in VR. I feel as if they took every user’s level into consideration when creating this app. Navigation, communication, ease of use all just wonderful. Going to stock up on credits for future updates. Looking forward to the Dr Richter one.

developer_response.body: Shaka. Great to see you in app at the Blockchain Live book launch event. Stay tuned for more guest speakers, panels and giveaways. Enjoy your haptic vest won from participating in the Book Launch event!!

reviews.review_description: Take VR to the next level and learn a skill instead of just being entertained... Retreat is the FIRST of it's kind. Use it!

developer_response.body: Exactly! Come out a better person to learn skills that make a difference :)

reviews.review_description:
Update 5.2024. Returned to try and use the app after being away due to some life events. Can't login. Password recovery does not work. Is this app still active??? Dropped rating  until this is resolved.


Prior Review: Love the range of lessons available and am looking forward to where this app is headed. I think as the library grows, people will see its full potential. Having a "hands on" experience to learn and expand your knowledge is much more valuable (to me) than just reading/listening/watching something to learn from. Excited!

reviews.review_title: Forgot password does not send a link .
reviews.review_description: I forgot my password and I click on forgot password. I do not receive an email and I cannot log in.
Haven’t been here for a while. Unable to log in. Please fix it.
Can't get in to this app .  Tried to set it up & it said it did not recognise my password . I requested a new one & never received the email . Disappointed!

reviews.review_title: Can only access 2 classes after paying
reviews.review_description:
The only classes that are available to Enter are Lala Parnian's Therapour Mannequins and Jason Campbell's class the flow state.
I took on the subscription because I was impressed with Mona Sharma's ethos in the demo and wanted to take the course.

I am aware that some of the courses are not available because they are 'Coming Soon' but I am unable to enter any of the courses bar two, also unable to enter the community area. 

I was hoping to get started with the following classes
Gisele Wyne - Your daily reset
Mona Sharma - Daily rituals to wellness
Unfortunately the above classes and most of the others there is only the option to 'Watch Trailer' not to Enter.

I did try the Mannequin class which looked fascinating. I tried the Mannequin course briefly but I didn't have the appropriate time or space for such emotional work, It seemed this was a group class which could have upto 60 participants? I think I would like the option to take some of the classes in Solitude. 

This looked promising with some good modules and an aesthetically pleasing environment within the app but it isn't working properly for whatever reason.

Sadly will cancel my subscription now. 
Disappointed

developer_response.body: Our servers were down for a day or two during this time period. Everything is back up and running again. We apologize for the inconvenience. This was related to Google domains not auto renewing a domain as intended, we digress.

reviews.review_description:
I have purchased a annual subscription but after the trail period ended I can no longer access the course. I purchased on May7, 2023, it is now May 17 and i can no longer acess this classes ....I didn't even think the trial would even apply since i bought the course rather then trail it. still waiting to hear back from support about gain access to the courses. 

I really want to give this app a positive review and will if I can just get help from IT support but now it is May 20snd still no response I have paid $99 and still I have no ability to watch the courses

developer_response.body: 5/22- We are looking into this right now and it should be resolved asap. 12/15 - We never heard back.
